gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT]. Meteoblue reports significantly different temperatures with a high of 30.5°C and a low of 16°C. Unfortunately, YR.no and Météo Belgique data could not be extracted. What a scorcher! It might be too hot even for a gazelle today in Brussels.
